rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN F. DONIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
rulings.Rulings: continued to may 9, 2017 for the following reasons: 1. the declaration must be signed and verified by the personal representative who is a fiduciary appointed in this proceeding (CRC 7.103(c)); 2. the statement re notice to Health Services must state whether decedent received benefits OR WAS THE SURVIVING SPOUSE of a person who received benefits (PC 9202(a)); 3. the statement re notice to the Victim's Compensation Board must state whether an heir is OR PREVIOUSLY WAS confined (PC 9202(b). new deadline for filing the declaration in order to avoid an automatic continuance is wednesday, may 3.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JAMES CHUN LO AND CHIN YU LO REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code Section 17200 Regarding Distribution From Intervivos Trust And Determination Of Trustees
rulings.Rulings: continued to June 6, 2017 for proper notice. notice was mailed 3/1/17, but the petition was not filed until 3/16/17. Notice cannot be mailed before the pleading requiring notice is filed (see Local Rule 14.21.A.). New notice must be mailed for the new hearing date. in addition, the verification under penalty of perjury on the proof of service was not dated. please make sure there is a date on the newly filed notice. A file stamped hard copy of the petition and a proposed order must be delivered in person to Room 202 by Wednesday, May 31, 2017 in order to avoid an automatic continuance. NOTE-->faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted.
